request.prompt: Use the reference as the exact character identity. Create one clean horizontal 8-frame pixel-art sprite strip. Action: gentle immersive music dance, natural limb motion, soft step, one hand and staff move slightly with the beat, hair and robe sway, body anchor stays stable, not a whole-body shake. Same Frieren-like silver-haired elf mage, same official white-gold outfit, same ordinary staff. Every frame same scale, same foot baseline, same camera, one full-body character per slot. Pure magenta #FF00FF chroma-key background across the whole image. No shadow, no glow, no floor, no text, no border, no grid, no scene, no duplicated extra character. Do not use magenta, pink, purple-pink, or colors close to #FF00FF in character, props, highlights, shadows, or effects.
